texto: We have no more right to put our discordant states of mind into the lives of those around us and rob them of their sunshine and brightness than we have to enter their houses and steal their silverware.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Julia Seton sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “We have no more right to put our discordant states of mind into the lives of those around us and …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, amizade, right, útil em momentos de reflexao.
